failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in the solvent
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and ensure solvent solubility at operating conditions

failure_modes.cause: Unexpected reaction exotherm or blockage downstream
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve and monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Simulate reaction exotherm by incrementally increasing temperature and monitor pressure response
